title: verbascum × patris
intro: Verbascum × hybrida, also known as the Verbascum × patris plant, is a hybrid species of the Verbascum genus, commonly found in gardens for its ornamental value. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, due to the presence of mucilages and iridoid glycosides, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × patris include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms associated with bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
